commands.review_summary:
The PR changes iOS RootTabs so normal launches fall back to Chat, destination-only launches derive their owning tab, and the iPhone tab bar/test guards move to Chat-first order.

PR surface: Other +64. Total +64 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main and v2026.6.11 return .control on ordinary iOS launch without --openclaw-initial-tab, while the PR changes that fallback to Chat. I did not run an iOS simulator in this read-only review, but the PR body reports after-fix simulator/runtime proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is maintainer/product approval for the iOS default-tab direction, not a mechanical code repair.

target.title: fix(ios): open app on Chat by default
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

The iOS app currently opens on the Control tab by default, even though the first-use product moment should lead with the familiar assistant chat surface.

## Why This Change Was Made

Opening directly to Chat makes the app feel more like a modern AI assistant while keeping Talk, Control, Agent, and Settings available from the tab bar. Explicit launch overrides still work, destination-only launches now derive the correct initial tab before falling back to Chat, and the iPhone tab bar order now matches the Chat-first product direction.

## User Impact

Users land on the Chat tab on a normal app launch instead of the Control hub. On iPhone, the bottom bar now reads Chat, Talk, Control, Agent, Settings so the visual order matches the default selection. Existing screenshot and destination launch flows can still request Control, Settings, Agent, Talk, or nested Control destinations explicitly.

## Evidence

- `swiftformat --config config/swiftformat apps/ios/Sources/RootTabs.swift apps/ios/Tests/RootTabsSourceGuardTests.swift`
- `git diff --check`
- XcodeBuildMCP `test_sim` on `OpenClaw` scheme with `-only-testing:OpenClawTests/RootTabsPresentationTests` and `-only-testing:OpenClawTests/RootTabsSourceGuardTests`: 77 passed, 0 failed
- XcodeBuildMCP `build_run_sim` on iPhone 17 Pro simulator: build and launch succeeded
- XcodeBuildMCP runtime proof: no-argument launch reported bottom tabs in order `Chat|1`, `Talk|0`, `Control|0`, `Agent|0`, `Settings|0`
- Previous XcodeBuildMCP runtime proof: after dismissing the gateway setup sheet, the visible root showed the Chat tab selected with the chat composer
- `codex review --base origin/main` found a destination-only launch regression; this PR now covers that case by deriving the initial tab from `--openclaw-initial-destination` before falling back to Chat
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings

## AI Assistance

AI-assisted with Codex. I reviewed the changed code and validation output before opening this PR.
target.author: bsniznd
